description: Standard: draft checked against 6 house rules

input.draft: The CEO, John Smith, announced that profits had increased 12 percent year-over-year. "This is a milestone," he said. The company — which operates in 14 countries — reported revenue of $3.4 billion for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025. About 4,500 employees will receive bonuses. Smith was previously President of the North American division.
rules: Use single quotation marks for all direct quotes
Spell out numbers one through ten, numerals for 11+
Job titles lowercase after a name

input.draft: The report was released on March 15, 2026.

The European Central Bank raised interest rates by 0.25% on Thursday, bringing the main refinancing rate to 4.75 per cent. ECB president Christine Lagarde said the decision was "unanimous." Analysts in Frankfurt and London had anticipated the move. Inflation across the eurozone fell to 2.3 per cent in February, according to Eurostat.
rules: Titles lowercase after name: 'ECB president Christine Lagarde'
Use % symbol in tables only, never in running text
